title: Jalan Pintas
overview: A fiction that revolves around the character of Bakar who – by taking a shortcut – became a victim of delusional promises of Kuala Lumpur. Tracing the course of a one-day journey of his life – we see a life of a man caught between hopes and responsibilities.
